# Instrumental Variable Methods

::: {.callout-note}
## Drafting note
Chapter content in progress. Migrate the corresponding text here; use `$...$` / `$$...$$` for math, place figures in `images/`, and use ```{r} or ```{python} code blocks.
:::

## Instrumental variables

_To be added._

## Applying instrumental variables

_To be added._

## Analysis steps

_To be added._

## Statistical tests

_To be added._

## Finding instruments

_To be added._

## Limitations

_To be added._

## Mendelian randomization

_To be added._
